notes.content:
SETUP REQUIRED:
1. Connect Twilio account (SID + Auth Token)
2. Connect Gmail account
3. Connect Google Sheets account
4. Replace +16025815675 with your Twilio number (e.g. +16025551234)
5. Replace +16027057885 with your mobile number
6. Replace +16027057885 with your on-call tech's number
7. Replace ServiceVoiceAI@gmail.com with your email address
8. Replace 1gOwW0J5PHgkk9ewOEM0IG7cS-DilJN9IP7OBRAqW_8s with your Google Sheets ID

TRIGGER: This scenario can be triggered two ways:
  Option A — Standalone: Configure Retell AI to call this webhook directly for emergency calls
  Option B — From Lead Capture: The Lead Capture scenario routes emergency calls here automatically
  Recommended: Use Option B (Lead Capture handles routing). Only use this standalone if you want a separate webhook for emergencies.
